requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (BSMD + GSO/CISPR 14 series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（BSMD + GSO版CISPR 14系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（BSMD + GSO版CISPR 14系列）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances supplied in Bahrain are expected to meet electromagnetic compatibility requirements based on the GSO-adopted CISPR/IEC framework, administered within the BSMD conformity system under MOIC. The applicable emission standard is the GSO adoption of CISPR 14-1 (electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — emission), with immunity to the GSO adoption of CISPR 14-2. These cover conducted and radiated disturbance limits relevant to compressor motors and inverter-driven (variable-speed) compressor electronics, as well as harmonic-current limits (IEC 61000-3-2 basis) where applicable. EMC test evidence is typically presented as part of the conformity dossier held by the in-country importer for BSMD acceptance. For appliances with wireless connectivity, additional radio/EMC requirements apply via the Telecommunications Regulatory Authority (TRA) — see the market-access row.
summary.zh: 在巴林供货的家用制冷器具应满足基于GSO采纳的CISPR/IEC框架的电磁兼容要求，由MOIC下属BSMD符合性体系管理。适用的发射标准为GSO采纳的CISPR 14-1（家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——发射），抗扰度依GSO采纳的CISPR 14-2。上述标准涵盖与压缩机电动机及变频（变速）压缩机电子设备相关的传导与辐射骚扰限值，以及（适用时）谐波电流限值（IEC 61000-3-2基础）。电磁兼容检测证据通常作为在地进口商持有的符合性档案的一部分提交BSMD接受。对于带无线连接功能的器具，另须经电信监管局（TRA）满足附加的无线电/电磁兼容要求——详见市场准入行。
summary.zht: 在巴林供貨的家用製冷器具應滿足基於GSO採納的CISPR/IEC框架的電磁相容要求，由MOIC下屬BSMD符合性體系管理。適用的發射標準為GSO採納的CISPR 14-1（家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——發射），抗擾度依GSO採納的CISPR 14-2。上述標準涵蓋與壓縮機電動機及變頻（變速）壓縮機電子設備相關的傳導與輻射騷擾限值，以及（適用時）諧波電流限值（IEC 61000-3-2基礎）。電磁相容檢測證據通常作為在地進口商持有的符合性檔案的一部分提交BSMD接受。對於帶無線連接功能的器具，另須經電信監管局（TRA）滿足附加的無線電/電磁相容要求——詳見市場准入行。

standards_or_laws: GSO CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (GSO adoption of CISPR 14-1)
GSO CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (GSO adoption of CISPR 14-2)
GSO IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (supplementary where applicable)
BSMD (Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate, MOIC) — EMC conformity within the regulated-product registration system

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (electromagnetic disturbance characteristics — emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015), with GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) for harmonic emissions. These are enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA. Because the Chinese and GSO emission standards both derive from CISPR 14-1, the technical baseline is broadly aligned, but CNAS-accredited Chinese CCC test reports are not automatically accepted by BSMD and should be presented via the GSO conformity route.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求依据GB 4343.1-2018（电磁骚扰特性——发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行，谐波发射依GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。上述标准在CCC制度下由SAMR/CNCA执行。由于中国与GSO发射标准均源自CISPR 14-1，技术基线大体一致，但CNAS认可的中国CCC检测报告不被BSMD自动接受，应经GSO符合性路径提交。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求依據GB 4343.1-2018（電磁騷擾特性——發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行，諧波發射依GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）。上述標準在CCC制度下由SAMR/CNCA執行。由於中國與GSO發射標準均源自CISPR 14-1，技術基線大體一致，但CNAS認可的中國CCC檢測報告不被BSMD自動接受，應經GSO符合性路徑提交。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: Because both GB 4343.1-2018 and the GSO CISPR 14-1 adoption derive from the same CISPR 14-1 family, the technical content gap is generally limited for many refrigerator types. Two practical gaps remain: (1) Acceptance/re-presentation — Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not automatically recognised by BSMD; the EMC evidence should be packaged within the GSO conformity dossier, preferably from an IEC/ILAC-accepted laboratory, and held by the in-country importer. (2) Inverter (variable-speed) compressor models — modern refrigerators may produce additional EMC phenomena; manufacturers should verify that existing GB 4343.1 test configurations cover the inverter-specific emission cases expected under the GSO CISPR 14-1 edition before relying on test-data re-use. Connected models additionally fall under TRA radio approval.
gap.zh: 由于GB 4343.1-2018与GSO采纳的CISPR 14-1均源自同一CISPR 14-1标准族，对许多电冰箱类型而言技术内容差距一般有限。仍存在两项实务差距：（1）接受/重新提交——中国CCC电磁兼容检测报告不被BSMD自动认可；电磁兼容证据应纳入GSO符合性档案，宜由IEC/ILAC接受的实验室出具，并由在地进口商持有。（2）变频（变速）压缩机型号——现代电冰箱可能产生附加电磁兼容现象；制造商在依赖复用检测数据前，应核实现有GB 4343.1测试配置是否涵盖GSO版CISPR 14-1预期的变频专项发射情形。联网型号另受TRA无线电核准约束。
gap.zht: 由於GB 4343.1-2018與GSO採納的CISPR 14-1均源自同一CISPR 14-1標準族，對許多電冰箱類型而言技術內容差距一般有限。仍存在兩項實務差距：（1）接受/重新提交——中國CCC電磁相容檢測報告不被BSMD自動認可；電磁相容證據應納入GSO符合性檔案，宜由IEC/ILAC接受的實驗室出具，並由在地進口商持有。（2）變頻（變速）壓縮機型號——現代電冰箱可能產生附加電磁相容現象；製造商在依賴複用檢測數據前，應核實現有GB 4343.1測試配置是否涵蓋GSO版CISPR 14-1預期的變頻專項發射情形。聯網型號另受TRA無線電核准約束。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (within BSMD conformity for regulated electrical products) — EMC conformity to the GSO CISPR 14-1 / 14-2 adoptions expected before importation and sale; connected models additionally require TRA approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) under CCC; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); enforced by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: Bahrain Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC) — Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC conformity to the GSO-adopted CISPR 14-1 (emission) and CISPR 14-2 (immunity) is expected for Bahrain market placement of household refrigerators within the BSMD conformity system. Chinese CCC EMC data (GB 4343.1-2018) shares the CISPR 14-1 baseline but is not automatically accepted by BSMD; package the evidence in the GSO dossier and verify inverter-compressor test coverage. Connected models require separate TRA approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 家用电冰箱投放巴林市场时，应在BSMD符合性体系内符合GSO采纳的CISPR 14-1（发射）和CISPR 14-2（抗扰度）。中国CCC电磁兼容数据（GB 4343.1-2018）虽与CISPR 14-1基线一致，但不被BSMD自动接受；须将证据纳入GSO档案并核实变频压缩机测试覆盖。联网型号须另行取得TRA核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 家用電冰箱投放巴林市場時，應在BSMD符合性體系內符合GSO採納的CISPR 14-1（發射）和CISPR 14-2（抗擾度）。中國CCC電磁相容數據（GB 4343.1-2018）雖與CISPR 14-1基線一致，但不被BSMD自動接受；須將證據納入GSO檔案並核實變頻壓縮機測試覆蓋。聯網型號須另行取得TRA核准。
